measured.desktop_1672x941: sidebar 200 + conversation rail + answer column + 320px right panel, no horizontal overflow, no page errors
measured.tablet_1024x768: 64px shell rail keeps answer column readable; right panel hidden below 1320px by design
measured.mobile_375x812: single column, drawer nav, input + suggestion chips intact, no overlap

differences: All reference regions are present and populated: two-line conversation items with category tag + snippet, 对话列表 header with count, filter tabs, structured answer with highlighted C++ code block and follow-up chips, right panel with status ring / fixture rhythm timeline / three fixed memory capsules (amber-purple-cyan) / dual growth stat tiles, and the Xiaoyu mascot.

Deliberate deviations kept for product reasons: the mode pill row replaces the reference's five static pills with live controls (model picker, cycling mode pill with tone-coded selected state, memory/focus/tools toggles); the 今日推荐能力 card row lives in the welcome empty state instead of inside every answer; extra navigation and abilities are preserved beyond the reference nav list.
Remaining sub-point nits: welcome empty-state capability cards keep a dimmer treatment than the reference's active answer, and the mascot's expanded Xiaoyu panel was not pixel-compared this round.
suggestions: If a later pass wants the mascot panel verified, add a fixture query flag that opens SparkXiaoyuWidget before capture.
Consider brightening welcome capability cards if the empty state becomes a canonical capture.
next_actions: Proceed to Wave 2 second module: smart schedule (/app/schedule).
Chat accepts only local touch-ups from here; shell and dashboard geometry stay frozen.
reasoning: Iteration 3 closes the styling gaps called out in iteration 2: reference memory capsules are now real actionable tiles (knowledge summary prompt, mistake review route, favorites opener), growth shows the reference dual amber/violet stat tiles, the fixture now seeds both the conversation and the right-panel rhythm so the canonical answer state is fully reproducible from the top of the thread, and the mode pill carries a bright tone-coded selected state. Composition, color language, typography, interaction states, and three-viewport behavior all verify clean with zero page errors, so the module reaches the bar with documented deliberate deviations.
